nodes.name: 根据SN查询snbym表中是否存在对应的料号

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM consm_barcodeinfo WHERE uuid IN ({{ $json.snList }});

SELECT DISTINCT
    j.joborder_number,
    r.retroid
FROM
    mes.retroid r
/* 核心优化：使用 LATERAL 仅查找当前 r.retroid_id 下最新的一条数据 */
/* 这避免了对 machine_data 全表进行扫描和排序 */
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT 
        md.data
    FROM 
        mes.machine_data md
    WHERE 
        md.retroid_id = r.retroid_id 
        AND md.procedure_detail_id = '79'
    ORDER BY 
        md.createtime DESC
    LIMIT 1
) rmd
JOIN 
    mes.joborder j ON COALESCE(rmd.data->>'jobNumber', rmd.data->>'ticketNo') = j.joborder_number
WHERE
    /* 1. 过滤条件被提到了最外层，作为主驱动条件 */
    r.retroid IN ({{ $json.snList }})
    AND r.status IN ('1', '2')
    AND j.status = '1';

parameters.query: SELECT * FROM consm_barcodeinfo WHERE uuid in ({{ $json.sn_list }});

SELECT DISTINCT
    j.joborder_number,
    r.retroid
FROM
    mes.retroid r
/* 核心优化：使用 LATERAL 仅查找当前 r.retroid_id 下最新的一条数据 */
/* 这避免了对 machine_data 全表进行扫描和排序 */
CROSS JOIN LATERAL (
    SELECT 
        md.data
    FROM 
        mes.machine_data md
    WHERE 
        md.retroid_id = r.retroid_id 
        AND md.procedure_detail_id = '79'
    ORDER BY 
        md.createtime DESC
    LIMIT 1
) rmd
JOIN 
    mes.joborder j ON  COALESCE(rmd.data->>'jobNumber', rmd.data->>'ticketNo') = j.joborder_number
WHERE
    /* 1. 过滤条件被提到了最外层，作为主驱动条件 */
    r.retroid IN ({{ $json.sn_list }})
    AND r.status IN ('1', '2')
    AND j.status = '1';
